# PackageCache Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-packagecache
kind: PackageCache
spec:
    clean: true
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: PackageCache
spec:
  manager: apt
  clean: true
  update: true
  restrictToRepos:
    - /etc/apt/sources.list.d/offline.list
```
